meta.title: Example edit pack — a two-roll dev demo
meta.purpose: A worked template showing every renderer feature. Point the sources at your own footage and run: node ../skills/edator/scripts/render.js edit-pack.example.json
meta.notes: Audio bed = the screen roll (the mic). The same start/end addresses the same instant in either roll because they were recorded on one clock.

timeline.reason: Intro, trimmed the throat-clear off the top.

Timelapse the dependency install — 20s of waiting becomes ~7s.

captions.text: 3x — nobody needs to watch npm install
